# services.davfs2

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.davfs2`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.davfs2.davGroup` | `string` | The group of the running mount.davfs daemon. Ordinary users must be member of this group in order to mount a davfs2 file system. Value must be given as name, not as numerical id. |
| `services.davfs2.davUser` | `string` | When invoked by root the mount.davfs daemon will run as this user. Value must be given as name, not as numerical id. |
| `services.davfs2.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable davfs2. |
| `services.davfs2.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string or attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string))` | Extra settings appended to the configuration of davfs2. See {manpage}`davfs2.conf(5)` for available settings. |
